name: Guard image_b64 Exclusion from EventRecord
description: After any write to shared/contract.py or services/brain/models.py, verifies that EventRecord does not include an image_b64 field

then.prompt: A critical data model file was just saved. Read shared/contract.py and verify that the EventRecord model does NOT contain an image_b64 field. This is a hard requirement — image_b64 must be excluded from EventRecord at the model level to prevent it from ever being stored in MongoDB. If image_b64 is present in EventRecord, flag it immediately and explain that it must be removed. If it is correctly absent, confirm the check passed.
